---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed behavior

What should happen? Be specific.

## Data / schema effects

Does this change the data model, API, or storage? How?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] criterion 1
- [ ] criterion 2
- [ ] tests added

## Agent context (if AI-authored)

- **Agent:** name (model)
- **Session:** timestamp
- **Handoff file:** `inbox/handoffs/...` (if applicable)
- **Related ADR:** `inbox/decisions/...` (if applicable)
